creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have run out of ideas for now, I see no differences in the files you posted and mine if I use your make.conf with minimal adaptations to my file paths and with permitting a MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER.

can you please do:

cd /usr/ports/math/Imath
make clean
make pretty-print-config # <- keep the output
make DEVELOPER=yes check-plist package &| tee make.log

then please attache the make.log (feel free to xz or gzip it) and paste the output from make pretty-print-config here (it's fine if you put it in the attachment's comment).
